claims.summary: Creative punctuation must respect an exact symbol-run boundary without false rejection.
claims.disposition: Verified by the seven-symbol acceptance and eight-symbol rejection regression added in the preceding packet.

claims.summary: Quoted and contextual model markers need exact accounting without erasing nearby meaning.
claims.disposition: Verified through single-pass raw-marker and nested straight/smart quote regressions.

claims.summary: Unknown structural text should not be guessed to be a model artifact.
claims.disposition: Verified: only exact known markers are removed; dense unknown structure remains reviewable and enters the ordinary quality checks.

claims.summary: Profile-dependent history compression needs bounded behavior.
claims.disposition: Verified in current profile/token-budget source and boundary tests; no live budget retune is warranted by this report.
